title: Malila Bible (NT) 2020
description_vernacular: “ɄMʉlʉngʉ ábhaganile abhantʉ bhonti mʉ nsɨ, ye nongwa akhamʉsonteelezya ʉMwana waakwe weeka mwene kwɨnza mʉ nsɨ umu, ɨnga umuntu wowonti we amwɨtɨkha ʉweene, atateegaje, lyoli abhe nu wuumi ʉwa wiila na wiila.

language.name: Malila
language.area: Mbeya region, 40 km southwest of Mbeya town. South of Safwa [sbk], north of Ndali [ndh], west of Nyakyusa [nyy], east of Nyiha [nih].
